title: calophyllum vanoverberghii
intro: Calophyllum vanoverberghii, also known as the Calophyllum tree or Philippine calophyllum, is a species of tree in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum vanoverberghii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against cell damage. Calophyllum vanoverberghii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and creams for topical use, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
